CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code: if event.TriggerBodyEntity.Name == "Door1_Switch" then if self.TargetDoor ~= nil then -- 문 엔티티를 비활성화하여 사라지게 합니다. self.TargetDoor.Enable = false end end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerLeaveEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code: -- 플레이어가 벗어나면 문을 다시 활성화합니다. if event.TriggerBodyEntity.Name == "Door1_Switch" then if self.TargetDoor ~= nil then wait(6) self.TargetDoor.Enable = true end end
